title: FileOutputFormat.java
description:
FileOutputFormat.java is a Hadoop MapReduce class managing output directories, handling compression, and generating unique file names. It extends OutputFormat, providing methods for creating record writers and checking output specifications. It sets and gets compression options, output directory, and handles task-specific temporary output directories. It initializes an OutputCommitter for managing the output directory, depending on Hadoop and Java classes for functionality.

TITLE: MultipleOutputs.java

DESCRIPTION: MultipleOutputs.java simplifies writing output data to multiple outputs in a MapReduce job. It allows defining additional outputs with their own OutputFormat, key class, and value class, supporting counters for tracking records written to each output. The class manages record writers for each named output, caches them to avoid repeated instantiation, and wraps them with RecordWriterWithCounter if counters are enabled. It uses an ExecutorService to manage a pool of threads for closing multiple output streams concurrently, depending on Hadoop MapReduce and Google Guava classes.
